description: Due to a maintenance issue, a flight has been cancelled. An agent must contact affected passengers and rebook them.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all passengers booked on the cancelled flight.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the passenger manifest for the flight.

nodes.task_description: For each passenger, find the next available flight to their destination.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the best alternative flight for each passenger.

nodes.task_description: Proactively rebook the passengers onto the new flight and send them a notification with their updated itinerary.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully rebooks all passengers and sends out notifications.
